message:
fix: upload Iceberg files via Worker R2 binding to fix miniflare list()

Miniflare R2 list() doesn't see objects uploaded via wrangler CLI.
Add /upload endpoint that writes through the Worker's DATA_BUCKET
binding, then use it for Iceberg file uploads in the seed script.
This ensures R2 list() in loadIcebergFromR2 can discover the metadata.
